finding_results.notes: Rebuilt Thessa's exposure sequence as a practical examination using a live residue bowl and a floor-mapped site problem. The humiliation beat now comes from Maren failing applied procedural questions rather than a repeated containment-pass/residual-clear prompt cadence.

Thessa now gives a concrete route: east to Harrow, then north to the Crook. The chapter also states why she withholds a written referral or advance warning: she will not deliver an unstable correction risk and a bounty trail to the region's last working camp.

The examination no longer uses the tripartite show-me/show-me/what-do-you-know escalation from the style-bible calibration line. Thessa's rhetoric is now case-based and procedural, grounded in observation and site logic.
Compressed the opening reminder to a single clause about the job Maren faked and removed the paragraph-length explanatory contrast between real and fake sin-eating.
Updated the recalled fee references from fifteen coppers to twelve coppers to match the continuity sheet and earlier chapters.
Added causally necessary material in Thessa's examination, refusal logic, and the road-aftershock beat. Final verified chapter length is 4542 words while preserving the heading contract.

summary: Revised Chapter 7 around the Thessa confrontation: the examination now humiliates Maren through applied craft failure instead of a style-bible echo, the refusal now names the Harrow-to-Crook route and the reason Thessa will not formally send him, the repeated real-vs-fake exposition was compressed, the fee continuity was corrected to twelve coppers, and the chapter now clears the 4500-word minimum at 4542 words.
